mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice ( title, content, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM notice WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, content, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM notice WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at ${order}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM notice WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
